It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Emperor Junnin]] が[[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion]] に加わったとして廃され、孝謙上皇が重祚、第48代・[[:en:Empress Kōken|Emperor Shōtoku]] に * [[:en:Enkyō (Kamakura period)|Enkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1308|1308]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - [[:en:Tokuji|Tokuchi]] から{{ill|Enkei|ja|延慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkei|1=Enkei (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306063}} に{{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * {{ill|Zheng Tong (Ming)|ja|正統 (明)|lt=Zheng Tong|lt_ja=正統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zheng Tong (Ming)|1=Zhengtong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840384}} 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） - [[:en:Korea|Joseon]] の[[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong]] が訓民正音（[[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] ）を公布 * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） - [[:en:Iwasaki Yatarō|Iwasaki Yatarō]] が{{ill|Tosa Kaiseisha|ja|土佐開成社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tosa Kaiseisha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を開設。{{ill|Mitsubishi zaibatsu|ja|三菱財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsubishi zaibatsu|1=Mitsubishi zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10866745}} の起源
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） - {{ill|Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja|山内豊信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山内容堂|1=Yamauchi Toyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q711001}} （[[:en:Yamauchi Toyoshige|Yamauchi Yūdō]] ）、14代[[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1872|1872]] ） * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） - [[:en:Yasuda Zenjirō|Yasuda Zenchirō]] 、[[:en:Yasuda zaibatsu|Yasuda zaibatsu]] 創始（+ [[:en:1921 (2021 film)|1921]] ） * 天保15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1844|1844]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） - [[:en:Yamada Akiyoshi|Yamada Akenori]] 、[[:en:Politician|Politician]] （+ [[:en:1892|1892]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenmon]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:641|641]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Shumei]] 、34代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:593|593]] ）

== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Emperor Junnin]] が[[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion]] に加わったとして廃され、孝謙上皇が重祚、第48代・[[:en:Empress Kōken|Emperor Shōtoku]] に * [[:en:Enkyō (Kamakura period)|Enkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1308|1308]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - [[:en:Tokuji|Tokuchi]] から{{ill|Enkei|ja|延慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkei|1=Enkei (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306063}} に{{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * {{ill|Zheng Tong (Ming)|ja|正統 (明)|lt=Zheng Tong|lt_ja=正統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zheng Tong (Ming)|1=Zhengtong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840384}} 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） - [[:en:Korea|Joseon]] の[[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong]] が訓民正音（[[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] ）を公布 * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） - [[:en:Iwasaki Yatarō|Iwasaki Yatarō]] が{{ill|Tosa Kaiseisha|ja|土佐開成社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tosa Kaiseisha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を開設。{{ill|Mitsubishi zaibatsu|ja|三菱財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsubishi zaibatsu|1=Mitsubishi zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10866745}} の起源
== Births == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1827|1827]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） - {{ill|Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja|山内豊信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山内容堂|1=Yamauchi Toyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q711001}} （[[:en:Yamauchi Toyoshige|Yamauchi Yūdō]] ）、14代[[:en:Tosa Domain|Tosa Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1872|1872]] ） * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） - [[:en:Yasuda Zenjirō|Yasuda Zenchirō]] 、[[:en:Yasuda zaibatsu|Yasuda zaibatsu]] 創始（+ [[:en:1921 (2021 film)|1921]] ） * 天保15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1844|1844]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） - [[:en:Yamada Akiyoshi|Yamada Akenori]] 、[[:en:Politician|Politician]] （+ [[:en:1892|1892]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenmon]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:641|641]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Shumei]] 、34代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:593|593]] ）
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初九]][[zh:十月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初九]][[zh:十月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初九]][[zh:十月初九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840025]] Wikidata name: 9th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 9|qq=October 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Emperor Junnin}} が{{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|WD=Q11623017|lt=Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion}} に加わったとして廃され、孝謙上皇が重祚、第48代・{{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Emperor Shōtoku}} に * {{ill|Enkyō (Kamakura period)|en|Enkyō (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1327068|lt=Enkei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1308|en|1308|WD=Q5723|lt=1308}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22}} ） - {{ill|Tokuji|en|Tokuji|WD=Q1327170|lt=Tokuchi}} から{{ill|Enkei|ja|延慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkei|1=Enkei (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306063}} に{{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * {{ill|Zheng Tong (Ming)|ja|正統 (明)|lt=Zheng Tong|lt_ja=正統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zheng Tong (Ming)|1=Zhengtong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840384}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1446|en|1446|WD=Q6430|lt=1446}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ） - {{ill|Korea|en|Korea|WD=Q18097|lt=Joseon}} の{{ill|Sejong the Great|en|Sejong the Great|WD=Q37682|lt=Sejong}} が訓民正音（{{ill|Hangul|en|Hangul|WD=Q8222|lt=Hangul}} ）を公布 * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} ） - {{ill|Iwasaki Yatarō|en|Iwasaki Yatarō|WD=Q380105|lt=Iwasaki Yatarō}} が{{ill|Tosa Kaiseisha|ja|土佐開成社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tosa Kaiseisha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を開設。{{ill|Mitsubishi zaibatsu|ja|三菱財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsubishi zaibatsu|1=Mitsubishi zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10866745}} の起源
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1827|en|1827|WD=Q7008|lt=1827}} {{ill|November 27|en|November 27|WD=Q3018|lt=November 27}} ） - {{ill|Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja|山内豊信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山内容堂|1=Yamauchi Toyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q711001}} （{{ill|Yamauchi Toyoshige|en|Yamauchi Toyoshige|WD=Q711001|lt=Yamauchi Yūdō}} ）、14代{{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|WD=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain}} 主（+ {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} ） * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25}} ） - {{ill|Yasuda Zenjirō|en|Yasuda Zenjirō|WD=Q3571972|lt=Yasuda Zenchirō}} 、{{ill|Yasuda zaibatsu|en|Yasuda zaibatsu|WD=Q3571974|lt=Yasuda zaibatsu}} 創始（+ {{ill|1921 (2021 film)|en|1921 (2021 film)|WD=Q107356491|lt=1921}} ） * 天保15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1844|en|1844|WD=Q7633|lt=1844}} {{ill|November 18|en|November 18|WD=Q3027|lt=November 18}} ） - {{ill|Yamada Akiyoshi|en|Yamada Akiyoshi|WD=Q859945|lt=Yamada Akenori}} 、{{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=Politician}} （+ {{ill|1892|en|1892|WD=Q7839|lt=1892}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenmon}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|641|en|641|WD=Q31676|lt=641}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|WD=Q329761|lt=Emperor Shumei}} 、34代{{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} （* {{ill|593|en|593|WD=Q33889|lt=593}} ）

{{Not to be confused with|October 9|qq=October 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764|1=764}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6|1=November 6}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Emperor Junnin|1=Emperor Junnin}} が{{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|WD=Q11623017|lt=Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|1=Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion}} に加わったとして廃され、孝謙上皇が重祚、第48代・{{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Emperor Shōtoku|1=Empress Kōken}} に * {{ill|Enkyō (Kamakura period)|en|Enkyō (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1327068|lt=Enkei|1=Enkyō (Kamakura period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1308|en|1308|WD=Q5723|lt=1308|1=1308}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22|1=November 22}} ） - {{ill|Tokuji|en|Tokuji|WD=Q1327170|lt=Tokuchi|1=Tokuji}} から{{ill|Enkei|ja|延慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkei|1=Enkei (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306063}} に{{ill|Change of era|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Change of era|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}} * {{ill|Zheng Tong (Ming)|ja|正統 (明)|lt=Zheng Tong|lt_ja=正統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zheng Tong (Ming)|1=Zhengtong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840384}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1446|en|1446|WD=Q6430|lt=1446|1=1446}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28|1=October 28}} ） - {{ill|Korea|en|Korea|WD=Q18097|lt=Joseon|1=Korea}} の{{ill|Sejong the Great|en|Sejong the Great|WD=Q37682|lt=Sejong|1=Sejong the Great}} が訓民正音（{{ill|Hangul|en|Hangul|WD=Q8222|lt=Hangul|1=Hangul}} ）を公布 * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2|1=November 2}} ） - {{ill|Iwasaki Yatarō|en|Iwasaki Yatarō|WD=Q380105|lt=Iwasaki Yatarō|1=Iwasaki Yatarō}} が{{ill|Tosa Kaiseisha|ja|土佐開成社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tosa Kaiseisha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を開設。{{ill|Mitsubishi zaibatsu|ja|三菱財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsubishi zaibatsu|1=Mitsubishi zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10866745}} の起源
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1827|en|1827|WD=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} {{ill|November 27|en|November 27|WD=Q3018|lt=November 27|1=November 27}} ） - {{ill|Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja|山内豊信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamauchi Toyonobu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山内容堂|1=Yamauchi Toyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q711001}} （{{ill|Yamauchi Toyoshige|en|Yamauchi Toyoshige|WD=Q711001|lt=Yamauchi Yūdō|1=Yamauchi Toyoshige}} ）、14代{{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|WD=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain|1=Tosa Domain}} 主（+ {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ） * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25|1=November 25}} ） - {{ill|Yasuda Zenjirō|en|Yasuda Zenjirō|WD=Q3571972|lt=Yasuda Zenchirō|1=Yasuda Zenjirō}} 、{{ill|Yasuda zaibatsu|en|Yasuda zaibatsu|WD=Q3571974|lt=Yasuda zaibatsu|1=Yasuda zaibatsu}} 創始（+ {{ill|1921 (2021 film)|en|1921 (2021 film)|WD=Q107356491|lt=1921|1=1921 (2021 film)}} ） * 天保15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1844|en|1844|WD=Q7633|lt=1844|1=1844}} {{ill|November 18|en|November 18|WD=Q3027|lt=November 18|1=November 18}} ） - {{ill|Yamada Akiyoshi|en|Yamada Akiyoshi|WD=Q859945|lt=Yamada Akenori|1=Yamada Akiyoshi}} 、{{ill|Politician|en|Politician|WD=Q82955|lt=Politician|1=Politician}} （+ {{ill|1892|en|1892|WD=Q7839|lt=1892|1=1892}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenmon|1=Tenbun}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|641|en|641|WD=Q31676|lt=641|1=641}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17|1=November 17}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|WD=Q329761|lt=Emperor Shumei|1=Emperor Jomei}} 、34代{{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} （* {{ill|593|en|593|WD=Q33889|lt=593|1=593}} ）
